lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: EDSY
sources.what: Alternate outfitting planner used to cross-check cargo capacity, laden jump range and shield figures for the trading fit.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Type-10 Defender ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Type-10 Defender
sources.what: Ship-specific stats, internal layout, cargo capacity, and shipyard pricing.

sources.label: Fandom — Type-10 Defender
sources.what: Lakon/Alliance lore, multipurpose-hauler role, and the ship's spec reference.
